description: Update the patient-facing flow to: get started -> privacy notice acknowledgement -> anonymous precheck -> account creation/sign-in -> telehealth consent + platform terms -> MDI patient profile -> MDI questionnaire -> medication disclosure when applicable. Revise copy and redirects so users understand why each acknowledgement appears at that point. Keep privacy-first before health-adjacent precheck and keep telehealth/platform acceptance before submitting the clinical questionnaire to MDI.
title: Reorder onboarding UI around staged disclosures
